description:
ICICI Lombard Elevate is an unlimited health insurance plan that provides unlimited sum insured options and access to an infinite claim amount with the Infinite Care benefit.

Also, this comes with unlimited restoration of the sum insured with the Reset benefit.

In this video , we will discuss the 5 main USPs of the plans , features , waiting periods & discounts available in ICICI Lombard Elevate Plan.

Watch the Video for more details :)
✅ To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/

📲 WhatsApp : https://wa.me/message/VJCYEKX3EWHOE1
📞 Call : 9650706699
💌  Mail us at: info@hareepatti.com

लेकिन एक टाइम बाद ICICI बैंक add on का charge इतना बढ़ा देगी कि वो आप afford नहीं कर पाओगे और फिर जिस भी renewal पर आपने उस particular add on का premium नहीं भरा तो सब कुछ Zero हो जाएगा।
फिर आपकी सारी मेहनत बेकार , आपने इतने सालों तक बेनिफिट्स के चक्कर में add on का जितना भी प्रीमियम भरा वो भी बेकार।

सिर्फ पछताने के सिवाय हाथ में कुछ नहीं रहेगा फिर आप सोचोगे अब मैं कोई और कंपनी में पॉलिसी Port करा लेता हूँ। कंपनी शुरू में लालच देती है ताकि customer को product बेचा जा सके, और एक बार जब आप फंसे फिर कंपनी कस्टमर को अपने हिसाब से नाच नचाती है और यदि आप कंपनी के हिसाब से नहीं चले तो आपकी पूरी पॉलिसी आपके किसी काम की नहीं रहेगी।

comments.text:
"We provided ICICI Lombard with complete information and all documents – police report, official FIR copy, district administration report, and media coverage. Despite this, the company is saying that the claim cannot be processed until the vehicle reaches the workshop. Our vehicle fell into a nearly 300-meter deep gorge, making it impossible to move it to a workshop ourselves. It is clear that the company is avoiding its responsibilities and trying to block the claim, even though all valid evidence is with them. We expect ICICI Lombard to take immediate and proper action in the interest of the customer.

If ICICI Lombard continues to behave this way and block claims, I will remain against their policies for life, and spreading awareness about this will be my lifelong mission. Uttarakhand has approximately 16,826 villages, and spreading the message that people should not buy policies from ICICI Lombard is not a big deal – it is now very easy to do. Today, social groups and networks in villages are very strong, so this message will reach everywhere. This clearly shows their lack of customer service and responsibility."
comments.author: @himalayanyogaayurveda6650

So, think twice before you took insurance with them.

comments.text:
I have been a policyholder with United India Insurance for over 20 years, covering both myself and my wife. We're both over 65, and despite their attractive offers, ICICI Lombard refused to cover us after learning about my wife's past heart palpitations and my cataract surgeries.

They promote coverage for various conditions from day one but ultimately deny policies when health issues are disclosed. Based on my experience, I strongly advise sticking with your current insurer if you already have a policy. ICICI Lombard's promises seem misleading. For more details, feel free to contact me. 

Thank you.

comments.text:
❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤❤🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉🎉Dear Gurleen Kaur,

You are an amazing and talented marketing expert. You could easily outshine Demosthenes. I have a few questions for you, and I hope you can help this old sailor understand.

How is your policy better than Aditya Birla Capital's policy? They have an interesting offer. If you pay the premium for three years and walk 7,500 steps daily (for those over 60) or 10,000 steps daily (for those under 60) for more than 325 days a year, you get a 100% discount on the premium for the next three years. This means free insurance for life if you keep it up. If walking 325 days a year is too hard, walking 275 days a year gets you a 50% discount on the next three years’ premium. If even that is tough, walking 13 days each month for three years gives you a 30% discount.

Their family floater policy covers a husband, wife, and four children. For example, a family with a 31-year-old couple and two children pays ₹89,000 for three years for a sum assured of ₹50 lakhs, with an additional ₹50 lakhs for cancer coverage. The sum assured increases by ₹50 lakhs every year up to ₹3 crores in five years without changing the premium, regardless of claims.

If you pay an extra ₹12,000 for a cancer booster, you get an additional ₹50 lakhs. So, in the event of cancer, you could have a combined sum assured of ₹1 crore in the first year, growing to ₹3.5 crores in five years. Even if you use the entire ₹50 lakhs in one hospitalization, another ₹50 lakhs is automatically topped up for a second hospitalization after 24 hours, with unlimited free top-ups throughout the year.

This policy is completely cashless, covering all consumables like PPE kits, gloves, masks, and syringes. The insurance company has a network of over 14,000 hospitals in India, including 400+ in Mumbai and 85+ in Indore. Their app tracks your lifestyle and physical activities, giving you daily tips and discount updates.

We are a 68-year-old couple who should walk 7,500 steps daily. However, we walk 21,000 and 14,000 steps each day, not for the 100% discount, but to stay healthy and avoid hospitals. We took this insurance for unpredictable events like cancer or accidents. At 68, I have studied the 55-page policy wordings of 15 companies and found Aditya Birla Capital’s terms far superior. Unlike some big names, they spread their risk with their international partners, reducing the risk of bankruptcy and ensuring genuine claims are not denied.

I believe other health insurance companies in India need to improve or they will become irrelevant. People are smarter than what marketing experts think.

With warm regards,
On behalf of the brotherhood of the Immortal Soul,
Sindabad the Sailor
🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔🤔
